title: rumohra wallichii
intro: Rumohra wallichii, also known as the Himalayan Maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rumohra wallichii include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Rumohra wallichii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
